programme.title: The Creator
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of a war between humans and robots with artificial intelligence, a former soldier finds the robots' secret weapon to end the conflict, an AI in the form of a child.

programme.desc: SURVIVOR 50 goes into uncharted territory and impact the players like never before. For the first time ever, the game is “In the Hands of the Fans”! the players won’t know what the fans voted for until they are competing on the island.

programme.desc: When a snow day cancels school, Adam and Barry discover Murray has a fear of snow. When the boys realize this, they exploit his weakness and take advantage of him. programme.desc: Bode Leone works alongside elite firefighters from Cal Fire and former friends, battling large-scale wildfires while navigating his complex past and personal relationships.

programme.desc: The recruits face new challenges including escaping a boat crash, an intense combat exercise, battling against each other in an intense boat race, and hauling 500 pounds of supply kits up a steep mountain.

programme.desc: Chowder accidentally wrecks Mung's childhood dice cycle.

programme.title: Chowder S2
programme.desc: Chowder is known for slicing, dicing and constantly causing trouble in the kitchen. Hold on to your apron, you're in for some laughs!

programme.title: Chowder S2
programme.desc: A lonely Miss Endive decides to cook herself a man-dish for a date.

programme.desc: After Gazpacho has a falling out with his mother, he moves in to the catering company.

programme.title: Chowder S2

programme.desc: Michael Jordan and Bugs Bunny team up in an outer space basketball match to save kidnapped Looney Tunes characters.

programme.title: Tad, the Lost Explorer, and the Secret of King Midas
programme.desc: Tad travels to Las Vegas to see his friend Sara’s latest discovery – a papyrus who turns everything he touches into gold.

programme.title: Piece By Piece
programme.desc: Follow this autobiography where Pharrell Williams shows his imaginative and creative process using Lego, as he constructs Lego models representing his artistic development. Each build reflects a different creative milestone.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In an epic Italian showdown, the final three All Stars cook the meal of their lives in an effort to take home the ultimate title and prize. To win, all they’ll need to impress not only the judges - Tom, Padma, Gail and Nilou Motamed, but also culinary superstars Mauro Colagreco, Clare Smyth, Marcus Samuelsson, Janice Wong, Tony Mantuano, Eighth Generation Italian Butcher Dario Cecchini and Food & Wine magazine’s Hunter Lewis. It’s a fight to the bitter end, but only one will have their second chance to finally be crowned Top Chef.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin
programme.desc: Tintin and his friends go on an exciting treasure hunt.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A veteran assigned to extract Earth's remaining resources begins to question his mission and his being.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: Sunny has to perform for his old school teacher and mentor.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs. However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.desc: The two oldest rhinos are set to be released back into the wild. Three rhinos cause a stir as they go missing, while the younger rhinos make steady progress toward health and happiness.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The poaching crisis intensifies and poachers turn their attention to orphanages. After losing her mother, four-week-old Jamila finally finds sanctuary at The Rhino Orphanage.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: It's an inspirational episode, we spend time with the team taking Māori to the metaverse and check-in on a couple of local disrupters focused on making digital worlds where everyone feels like they can belong.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: What if Bitcoin mining could actually save the world? Over this episode, we meet the local company on a mission to use it to help solve global warming.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: We profile Kaye-Maree Dunn, an innovator developing digital data sovereignty and we find out how NFTs can allow us to own our own artificial intelligence. It's an episode that will blow your mind.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the foundations of Cryptocurrency and talk to the local crypto pioneers who risked it all.

programme.title: The Story of Playstation
programme.desc: With video-games on the rise, Sony, the tech superpower would attempt a collaboration with Nintendo. After a shocking betrayal, Sony founded what would become the world’s most successful chain of video game consoles. The Playstation was here to stay.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus and Axel unveil their new "mechano-dragon." It's impressive at first, but the Riders set out to prove it's no better than a bucket of bolts.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: In need of some rest and relaxation, the Riders head out on vacation. But their supposedly perfect island getaway isn't quite what they hoped for.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna is dog sitting but unable to sleep due to barking, TZG secretly stops a skunk from sneaking into her yard at night and riling the pooch. / When an inexperienced Rona takes over as chairman of the Founder’s Day Celebration, TZG secretly helps ensure the traditional festivities run smoothly.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Phoebe convinces the Tooth Fairy to visit before Marcus has actually lost his tooth, the Dew Drops do everything in their power to make sure the tooth is out before she arrives! / The Dews decide to hold a concert in the park for their animal friends, but can’t find the time to practice.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag chooses to pair up with her Grandpaw for the Barker Family Talent Show, and together, they search for their winning talent. \ Tag is surprised to learn that today is the Pawston Snoozie-a-Hullabaloozie. With everything shut down for the day, Tag and Scooch take the opportunity to play all over town, while trying not to wake up other dogs.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag can't wait to show off her car at the car show. But when Cheddar Biscuit wants to come along and pick up her clown friends along the way, Tag is wary that Cheddar Biscuit will steal her thunder. \ The Not Yet Cadets can't wait to watch Sam’s big race. But when Sam loses his car key, he challenges the Not Yet Cadets to race around town to find it.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Ranger Team Leader Mama Box helps Kitty Ranger Gabby and Pandy get a lost Baby Me-Owl back home to its Mama in the Fairy Tale Garden. They embark on a hiking adventure! They learn about animal tracking, earn patches along the way, and ultimately, reunite Baby with Mama!

programme.title: No Dog Left Behind
programme.desc: Experiences from soldiers with very different and moving stories who rescued dogs in Iraq, developed intense bonds.

programme.title: Rambo 3
programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he’s finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo’s friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: Battleship

programme.title: Sweet Stranger and Me
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. With time, she accepts him as a family; he always takes her side and loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Music Bank
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: World-Class K-Dol
programme.desc: K-pop Idols Meet the World! A one-of-a-kind K-pop entertainment show where idols experience global cultures and connect with fans worldwide.

programme.title: UNESCO World Heritage Special
programme.desc: 1. The King's Residence, Changdeokgung 2. The Secret Garden of Changdeokgung 3. The Secret of the Volcanic Island 4. Forest of the Stone Buddha 5. Harmony of the Heaven and Earth, Hawking 6. The Underwater Palace, Daryeodo 7. Scholar's Waterway, Hahoe Folk Village 8. A Worship for the King, Gwangneung Forest

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe at Fun-Staurant
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: Music Bank K-Chart
programme.desc: Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: Two Days and One Night 4
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the "2 Days and 1 Night" casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian arms dealer to locate and destroy a cache of munitions. However, when he finally finds them, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and must team up with his partner to recover the weapons and prevent a disaster.

programme.title: Monkey Twins
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his lover, Neua learns Monkey Muay Thai and vows to avenge her death. His lover’s sister, who practises Chinese Kung Fu, initially suspects Neua of being responsible, but later discovers that her sister was killed by an organised crime ring. Together, they join forces to uphold justice and seek vengeance.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Anong Ganap?
programme.desc: Being in on the entertainment circle is quick and easy on PBO's Anong Ganap? Presented by the gorgeous entertainment anchor ng bayan, Phoemela Baranda.

programme.title: Kailangan Ko'y Ikaw
programme.desc: Francine Natra (Regine Velasquez) and Gimo Talumpati (Robin Padilla) crossed paths when Gimo won the "Date With A Star" contest thus taking the popular Francine on a special date. But their fairytale love story struggled when the relationship went public.

programme.title: It Takes a Man and a Woman
programme.desc: Miggy and Laida try to co-exist in the same company while Laida tries to oppose Miggy's business decisions through a series of events which made them realize the real definition of true love.

programme.title: Sid & Aya (Not a Love Story)
programme.desc: It follows Sid (Dingdong Dantes) who suffers from insomnia and meets Aya (Anne Curtis) who he hires to accompany him in his sleepless nights.

programme.title: Working Boys 2: Choose Your Papa
programme.desc: About the bums who need to strategize in life, the roles of the three are sloppy every time they strategize. All three are natural comics so they are very natural in their roles.

programme.title: Sons of nanay Sabel
programme.desc: After she was accused of being a negligent mother, Sabel's (Ai-ai delas Alas) wedding to Prince Harry was cancelled. To make things right, she embarks on a journey to find her estranged sons and reunite her family.

programme.title: Bekikang
programme.desc: Bekikang is left and abandoned with a baby boy by friend, Fortunato. He loves and raises the child as his own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Maria Labo
programme.desc: A popular urban legend about a woman who devours human flesh.

programme.title: Scorpio Nights 2
programme.desc: Andrew is meticulous almost to the point of obsession. His ordered existence is suddenly disrupted when one sexually adventurous student, Valerie, starts seducing him.

programme.title: Ang Lalake sa Parola
programme.desc: This story is a search for oneself as seen through the lens of rural homosexuality and myths; and the lies that people create to escape the bitter realities of life.

programme.title: Maid in Malacañang
programme.desc: The Last Days of Ferdinand and Imelda Marcos tells the untold story of the last 72 hours of the Marcos dynasty.

programme.title: MIA
programme.desc: Mia Salazar (Coleen Garcia), a self-destructive, alcoholic doctor who joined the Doctor to the Barrios program to heal from the tragedy of her fiance's death meets the cheerful and nerdy forester Jay Policarpio (Edgar Allan Guzman). Together, the two will embark on a new journey.

programme.title: Sanggano't Sanggago
programme.desc: After 30years Waldo (Eddie Garcia) is finally released from prison. But he gets the shock of his life when he finds Billy (Bayani Agbayani) living in his abode.

programme.title: Forged in Fire (S10)
programme.desc: Four smiths must sift through a pile of junk in order to make a signature Damascus blade. After an intense couple of rounds, two smiths head back to their home forge to recreate a complex broadsword.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: As the season hits full stride, alligators begin changing their behaviours—and the hunters must adjust to stay ahead. Joey and Zak swap their trademark weapons to see who can nab the biggest bulls.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: The evidence is building, and the team believes they are finally zeroing in on the Treasure Vault. With confidence at an all-time high, the Fellowship prepares to retrieve it as they call in the caissons.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: With time running out, the team returns to Le Chameau for another attempt at its elusive stern. When a series of finds threatens to upend their plan, the team must make one final push.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Along the Earth's north 37th parallel, there have been so many reports of UFO's that it has been dubbed The UFO Superhighway. Is there something about this latitude attracting extraterrestrial visitors?

programme.title: Forged in Fire (S10)
programme.desc: Four smiths must sift through a pile of junk in order to make a signature Damascus blade. After an intense couple of rounds, two smiths head back to their home forge to recreate a complex broadsword.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: The evidence is building, and the team believes they are finally zeroing in on the Treasure Vault. With confidence at an all-time high, the Fellowship prepares to retrieve it as they call in the caissons.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team has secret intel on a wreck that might be a legendary 1930s disappearance: the champion racing yacht known as Ingomar. Lured by a light, the Ingomar's seasoned crew smashes into an obstacle.

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: From a Michigan man who was there, Mike learns about Evel Knievel's rocket-powered Snake Canyon jump—and is determined to buy a one-of-a-kind billboard rescued from the site.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S15)
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the world's top ten mysterious islands, including sites said to be home to giants, remote landmasses home to megalithic structures, and islands that disappear into thin air.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: They've been called the world's greatest archaeological enigma. 2,000-year-old geoglyphs made in the Peruvian desert that span over 50 miles. The drawings are so massive, they can be seen from the air.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: During WWII, the Nazis stole vast amounts of art, gold, silver, and currency, and stashed them across Europe. While some of the plunder has been recovered, much more is still missing nearly 80 years later.

programme.title: 1942: Philippine Resistance: Refusal to Surrender
programme.desc: Gen MacArthur famously promised that 'I shall return' before retreating but this was possible only with Filipino guerrillas bravely fighting on.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S2)
programme.desc: Two visionaries breathe new life into the hotel industry in America and the world by setting the modern standard for hospitality. Despite setbacks, these rivals will stop at nothing to be number one.

programme.title: History's Deadliest with Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: From drug kingpins and serial killers to pirates, assassins, and murderous con men, these are the criminals whose bloody legacies earn them a spot among 'History's Deadliest'.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18)
programme.desc: In South Carolina, Mike, and Jersey Jon fall hard for a grand old Southern home that's lost in time. Terry rescued the abandoned Southern belle and brought her back to life.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: During WWII, the Nazis stole vast amounts of art, gold, silver, and currency, and stashed them across Europe. While some of the plunder has been recovered, much more is still missing nearly 80 years later.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S2)
programme.desc: Two visionaries breathe new life into the hotel industry in America and the world by setting the modern standard for hospitality. Despite setbacks, these rivals will stop at nothing to be number one.

programme.title: History's Deadliest with Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: From drug kingpins and serial killers to pirates, assassins, and murderous con men, these are the criminals whose bloody legacies earn them a spot among 'History's Deadliest'.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S15)
programme.desc: Ancient Aliens is counting down the world's top ten mysterious islands, including sites said to be home to giants, remote landmasses home to megalithic structures, and islands that disappear into thin air.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: They've been called the world's greatest archaeological enigma. 2,000-year-old geoglyphs made in the Peruvian desert that span over 50 miles. The drawings are so massive, they can be seen from the air.

programme.title: 1942: Philippine Resistance: Refusal to Surrender
programme.desc: Gen MacArthur famously promised that 'I shall return' before retreating but this was possible only with Filipino guerrillas bravely fighting on.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18)
programme.desc: In South Carolina, Mike, and Jersey Jon fall hard for a grand old Southern home that's lost in time. Terry rescued the abandoned Southern belle and brought her back to life.

programme.title: Customs Frontline
programme.desc: After boarding an unauthorized cargo ship and finding its entire crew dead, the Hong Kong Customs officers uncover a hidden cache of illegal weapons linked to an international conflict. As Customs officer Zhou Zheng Li and Interpol’s Ying go undercover, they unveil a multinational operation with ties closer to home.

programme.title: The Tigress of Shaolin
programme.desc: Sam is being hunted as he discovers that the mayor and the chief of medical bureau are colluding with a drug dealer. He is saved by a fishermen family and works in their friend’s grocery but the grocery owner is killed when the enemies track Sam down. Sam escapes to Shaolin to learn the cudgel style of kung fu in order to avenge his friends.

programme.title: The Flying Guillotine
programme.desc: Ma Teng is an assassin of the ‘Flying Guillotine Squad’, a group of killers commissioned by the Emperor Yung. When Ma starts to question the morality of his missions, he finds himself becoming a fugitive hunted by his former comrades.

programme.title: Ambitious Kung Fu Girl
programme.desc: Si Si, a spoiled and naive rich girl with only basic kung fu training, becomes enchanted by the legends of the fearless hero Qin Ge. Determined to escape her father’s arranged marriage, she disguises herself as a man and sets out to find him, hoping to challenge Qin Ge—only to be drawn into a deadly plot within the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Martial Club
programme.desc: The young Wong Fei Hung and his friend Wang Yin Lin offend the young master of another rival school and the expert they hire, causing both martial arts schools to fight against each other. This is Director Liu Chia Liang’s masterpiece and one of the top ten highest grossing movies in 1981.

programme.title: Detective Dee's the Zombie Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter —the sole witness— mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: My Young Auntie
programme.desc: An elderly landowner marries young Dai Nan to keep his inheritance away from his unscrupulous nephew before he dies. When Dai Nan brings along the deed to meet his other nephew, a series of amusing incidents happen with this “young” auntie, the nephew and his son. Kara Hui won Best Actress in the first Hong Kong Film Awards for her role as Dai Nan.

programme.title: Legend of the Fox
programme.desc: A young man, Chin, believes he is an orphan, until he meets three men and learns from them that his father was a great swordsman who was killed when he was trying to dispel rumors of a wrongdoing and return a lost sword to its rightful owner. Chin seeks out the men’s help to take vengeance on the wrongful death of his father.

programme.title: The Moon Thieves
programme.desc: A crooked watch dealer assembles a daring crew - a thief, an explosive expert, a lock breaker and a watch connoisseur - to steal three luxury watches in Tokyo. Their mission takes an unexpected turn when they discover the legendary 'Moonwatch.' Pursued by the yakuza, the team must unite to navigate the chaos and pull off their high-stakes heist.

programme.title: Judgement of an Assassin
programme.desc: An evil clan plans a discord so as to dominate the martial arts world. Their masked assassins massacre another clan and one of the assassins is arrested and brought to trial at a tribunal of all the clans. What judgement will they make and can they uncover the truth?

programme.title: Vengeance is a Golden Blade
programme.desc: Convoy Master Li’s wife has an affair with his rival Long, who plans to steal Li’s Golden Blade and kill him as well as his young daughter. Li and his daughter manage to escape and the latter grows up to be a skilled swordswoman who vows to avenge her mother’s death – a lie told by Li. The truth is revealed when she sees her mother alive by chance.

1921 reproduces the historical moment when the Chinese Communist Party first convened for the National Congress in Shanghai. Portraying thrilling spy warfare in a youthful style and depicting historical events with an international perspective, this blockbuster triumphantly celebrates the centenary of the founding of the Chinese Communist Party.

programme.title: Wish Comes True
programme.desc: Xiao Fei is a cheerful girl who has been abandoned by her mother. One day, she encounters a gifted young man named Zi Wai, who is battling a rare disease. Determined to help him, she embarks on a journey to find his lost love. Even when they discover that the drug treating Wai is ineffective, they choose to embrace hope and love together.

programme.title: Hatulan: Bilibid Boys 2
programme.desc: Bilibid Boys are young and daring but lost in a cruel society.

programme.title: Isinakdal ko ang aking Ina
programme.desc: Can a mother forsake her child? She is a doctor, who almost has everything but despite her wealth, she is not happy. Unknown to her, the son she’s looking for is the very man who has been driving her around.

programme.title: Andrea, Paano ba ang Maging Isang Ina?
programme.desc: Two teachers find themselves on opposite sides in the fight for freedom. Nora Aunor is the woman who chose to join the rebels while her friend, Gina Alajar opted for a quiet life with her husband.

programme.title: SPO1 Don Juan (Da Dancing Policeman)
programme.desc: Leo Martinez is a policeman who directs traffic with choreographed dance movements. Unknown to him he has a look-alike who takes advantage of his popularity with motorists by directing traffic for get-away cars during robberies.

programme.title: Boyong Manalac, Hoodlum Terminator
programme.desc: After living a life full of vices, women and violence, Boyong Mañalac decided to turn his life around and mend his ways by taking after his father, an upright police officer. Boyong Mañalac personify the ideals of integrity and service to his countrymen.

programme.title: Hiram na Mukha
programme.desc: Famous plastic surgeon Dr. Hugo (Christopher de Leon) worships the ground his fiancee Alicia (Nanette Medved) walks on. That is because he feels Alicia is his creation.

programme.title: Ikaw ang Mahal Ko
programme.desc: The King of the Philippine Movies and the Star for All Seasons team up in this hilarious and heartwarming romantic comedy. FPJ and Vilma Santos meet in the most bungling of situations and they become fast enemies.

programme.title: Jack & Jill (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Everything in this tale seemed like a strange mix-up and you will find more in this utterly hilarious remake of a Mars Ravelo komiks classic.

programme.title: Burlesk Queen
programme.desc: One of the classics of Philippine cinema wherein screen ingenue Vilma Santos made her transition into matured actress. Into this world came the young girl who becomes its last shining star. But as her presence brought life into the old art, her own existence is endangered by the decaying surroundings.

programme.title: Abot Hanggang Sukdulan
programme.desc: The abduction and rape of the eldest daughter shattered the once happy Paredes household. They vowed to get justice for their daughter but changed their plan when Romano offered marriage after it was discovered that Agnes was pregnant.

programme.title: Jabidah Massacre
programme.desc: Based on the expose made by the late Senator Benigno "Ninoy" Aquino, Jabidah Massacre chronicles the story of how a group of recruits are turned into soldiers for a secret mission - the invasion of Sabah.

programme.title: Sana Ay Ikaw na Nga
programme.desc: Vina Morales played Jessica in this movie. Jessica was an upcoming singer who met Gary (Keempee de Leon), a lead singer of the band and Karlo (Christopher de Leon), Gary's older brother who was an ex-convict. This love triangle story is about love, music and drugs.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan Highlights
programme.desc: Many now rarely-seen crafts live on in the remote villages of the Kii Mountains. We see aged artisans producing pigment from pine tree soot and crafting traditional wooden buckets and tubs.

programme.title: The Wakey Show
programme.desc: This episode features "Wakey's Door" on the Japanese school backpack randoseru,"Mind and Body Exercise" to move and feel refreshed, and a Comedy Writers skit,"I Lose Things." It energizes kids.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Join May J. for great Japanese music! This week, DJ Night Tempo (the driving force behind a worldwide city-pop boom) and up-and-coming indie rock band MEminor are in the studio to chat and perform.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-8.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Ueno is home to world-class cultural facilities, a bustling street market, a historic shrine, and much more. We look at some of the many features that make this diverse urban environment so popular.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Chichibu is a mountainous region with lots of natural beauty. Cats keep watch over a field of red spider lilies and even guide visitors through the mountains! We also meet a cat who lives at a shrine.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: #1 Crabs and Zombies
programme.desc: Huge crowds navigate Shibuya's scramble crossing without colliding. How? Murakami Hisashi, studying how animals move in groups, found a clue. Can amazing collective behavior shed light on life itself?

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Washi, diverse beauty in everyday life. Dive deep into the ancient capital, still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Telling passengers in a hurry that they may be late. Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical, effective workplace expressions, understand business culture and improve your kanji.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Substandard fabric from Himei Akira's dye works is now being made into a new composite material. With its wood-grain pattern, it's useful in everything from furniture to small accessories.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programme.desc: The brilliant white Himeji Castle is a rare example of a wood castle built without a single nail. With solid battle defenses and beauty preserved by craftsmen, it's a masterpiece of function and form.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: Grand Sumo Highlights
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from May 24, Day 15 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Tokyo.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: Chinese mother Yang Hu finds reassurance in a Japanese word that helps her connect with others while navigating cultural differences in Tokyo.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Global warming has raised sea temperatures, increasing powerful typhoons worldwide. The program reports on their impacts and explores with experts the mechanisms and causes of their intensification.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Tsukamoto Yoshiharu (Architect) visits Nara. Long ago, people in Nara preserved ice by building an icehouse on a mountain ridge, showing how architecture can make use of natural characteristics.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: The team explores a factory in Saitama making globes for educational use and much more besides. See the skill it takes to turn flat maps into spherical globes - and what in the world is an "AR globe"?

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Wakayama in southwest Kumano is a top producer of Japanese citrus, which is said to have its origins in a legendary fruit. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we show the area's rich natural bounty.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: Bosai:Safe Journey in Japan
programme.desc: The number of visitors to Japan is rising. However, many do not know what to do during an earthquake, tsunami or typhoon. Find out the technologies being developed to protect visitors from disasters.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to hot water. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: 22 Let's take a photo. / Encourage someone to do something with you by replacing "masu" at the end of a verb with "mashoo." "Torimasu" becomes "torimashoo."

programme.title: Culture Crossroads
programme.desc: Introducing an artist who adorns Japanese kimonos with classic Hungarian embroidery. What kind of beautiful works are created by this unusual fusion of two cultural traditions?

programme.title: Hello!NHK World Japan
programme.desc: In May, NHK WORLD-JAPAN showcases Japanese technology, through regular programs like Japan's Top Inventions and Japan Railway Journal, and a special newly translated to English: Project X.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: After the Pokey Pigeons eat all of Abuela's elotes, Dora and Boots set out to find more ingredients for the Great Abuela Cook-off. / Dora, Boots and Backpack play an adventurous game of Hide-and-Seek to find Map.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto "finders, keepers" a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: It's Friend Appreciation Day! But when Speed Meister's gift for Mr. McTurtle goes awry, he has to call Rubble & Crew for help. / Rubble & Crew help Lucas make the most awesome Science Fair volcano ever. But will Wingsy get in the way of the eruption?

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Motor needs help at the fire station, a new Fire Captain comes to town to help train all the pups as new firefighter recruits. // Charger can't wait to help Sierra Sparkle with her big show! Well, until his hurt paw causes a cone complication.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Chickaletta is left driving the train after an enormous chicken floaty launches Ed out the window. // Digi & Tal volunteer at the Pet Parlor. But when they run out of pets to pamper.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny gain the confidence to sing at the Canta Conmigo show. // Dora helps Boots find a special Heart Banana to show everyone at Show and Share.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Abuela shows Dora her photo album of birds, with one page blank: the Quickatoo. Dora vows to find the Quickatoo and get a picture to complete the album.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Young François witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew switch to cleanup mode when construction on Café Carl's new popcorn restaurant pops out of control. // A soapy accident causes slippery mayhem all over Builder Cove. Can the pups clean it up in time for Mayor Greatway's big jump?

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Daring Danny X is performing a new stunt! He is harnessed over a canyon eating an Extreme Lunch when the wind blows him upside down! // It's Pie Swap Day! Humdinger sends Rocky Kitty to take one of Mr. Porter's tasty pies, so he can join the contest.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Myrna the Mynah bird leads her feathered friends astray and it's up to the Paw Patrol to rescue the wayward flock. // Adventure Bay is holding a kids only soapbox derby race when a mysterious newcomer named ''Hum-Kid'' shows up and breaks the rules!

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: The Creature Cases
programme.desc: Who took a chomp out of Bill and Jill's satellite van in the swamp? // Sam and Kit investigate the strange shrieks keeping the bats awake in a cave.

programme.title: The Creature Cases
programme.desc: In a world of anthropomorphic animals, Sam Snow and Kit Casey are elite agents of C.L.A.D.E. (Covert League of Animal Detective Experts) who travel the world solving mysteries with their expertise in problem-solving and animal facts.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Everest and Jake try to rescue a little penguin and end up floating out to sea on a homemade bridge. // Katie's kittens are all covered in mud and running amuck! If they're not rounded up, the Cat Show will be ruined.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the Pups race to save Mayor Goodway's Glow-in-the-Dark Party guests when a frightened Alien Boy zaps them into floating space bubbles.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When a family can't get to the airport in time on Speed Meister's road, Rubble & Crew has to build a new road before takeoff.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Mandy the monkey escapes from her cage on the train, Ryder and the PAW Patrol are lead on a wild chase! // During a bad wind storm, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to save an Owl trapped in a blown over tree and reunite her baby.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Carlos and Tracker calls the Paw Patrol to help solve the mystery of a rumbling sound that's upsetting the Jungle elephants.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: With their splash park plans in troubled waters, the pups have to get creative to cool down the town for the summer. // As the pups work on building a surprise playroom for Lucas and Lily, a squirrelly visitor causes construction complications.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Map help Tío Tesoro find his treasure trackers and become a treasure map again. // Dora and Boots investigate a mysterious key so they can discover more about Dora's great-great grandma, the first exploradora.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora helps Ratoncito Perez fix his magic toothbrush wand so she can get a gift for her missing tooth. // Dora meets Carlos, a giant caterpillar who wants to be a butterfly! They need to find some butterberries that will help him transform.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mooreen. // Popstar Sierra Sparkle is moving to Builder Cove! But when the pups plan a surprise greeting, Speed Meister makes a plan of his own.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When a family of bunnies hops onto the soccer field, Rubble & Crew use their skills to build a new sport... Bunny Ball! // After the pups discover a new kind of butterfly, it flutters away! Will a giant butterfly garden help bring it back?

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Pups need to lure a big ape onto the PAW Patroller so they can take him back to the jungle. // Skye Kitty gets stuck beside an eagle's nest and needs help getting down.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: The Kit-trastrophe crew get into the poufy shampoo and blow away. // Marshall dreams he gets shrunk.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: The pups jump into action to build an observatory to help their friend River get a cool picture of a shooting star! // After meeting Park Ranger Rose, the pups get stuck on a nature trail. But Rubble & Crew, finds a construction solution.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Grumpy Old Troll untwist his tongue with Quickatoo's help. // Dora and Boots help Chompy find another Cloud Flower Seed after he accidentally eats Isa's.

programme.title: ER S2 10
programme.desc: During the Christmas season, a patient who resembles Santa visits the ER with a hand injury from making toys. Greene becomes upset when Jennifer asks to take their daughter away for the holidays.

programme.title: The Enforcer
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Clint Eastwood returns as Dirty Harry Callahan in this hard-edged thriller. San Francisco police inspector Harry Callahan is assigned a female partner (Tyne Daly), but he has little time to express his displeasure because terrorists kidnap the mayor. Now no holds are barred when Dirty Harry goes into action.

programme.title: Barry Lyndon
programme.desc: Forced to leave Ireland after killing an English officer in a duel, handsome young Redmond Barry (O'Neal) seeks his fortune as a soldier in Prussia, as a spy then as a gambler living among the elite of Europe. He changes his name and marries an aristocrat (Berenson) for her wealth, but the acceptance he seeks finally eludes him.

programme.title: Friends S7 15
programme.desc: Joey's character on a daytime drama becomes more prominent--to the chagrin of the show's diva star. Phoebe and Rachel argue over who should return a sexy man's misplaced cell phone to him.

programme.title: Friends S7 16
programme.desc: Chandler finds out who Monica really wanted to have sex with on the night they became lovers. Ross is furious after Rachel teaches Ben practical jokes.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: In a universe as vast as it is mysterious, a small but powerful force has existed for centuries. Protectors of peace and justice, they are called the Green Lantern Corps.

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Venus and Serena Williams, this film follows their undeterred father's journey in raising the tennis superstars.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: A man (Ewan McGregor) living in a futuristic sterile colony begins to question his circumscribed existence when his friend (Scarlett Johansson) is chosen to go to the Island – reportedly the last uncontaminated place on earth.

programme.title: Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: Acclaimed filmmaker Christopher Nolan writes, directs and produces this wartime epic action thriller. Dunkirk opens as hundreds of thousands of British and Allied troops find themselves surrounded by enemy forces in the Northern French City during 1940 World War II. Trapped on the beach with the sea at their backs, they face an impossible situation as the German troops close in. The story unfolds on land, sea and air. RAF Spitfires engage the enemy in the skies above the Channel, trying to protect the defenseless men below. Meanwhile, a quickly assembled British fleet led the legendary evacuation of over 300,000 Allied military forces in what Prime Minister Winston Churchill would call a "miracle of deliverance."

programme.title: Friends S7 17
programme.desc: Monica battles another shopper for the perfect wedding dress. Ross and Joey compete for the same woman.

programme.title: Friends S7 18
programme.desc: Joey overreacts at a daytime drama awards show. Ross sees Chandler leaving a male strip club.

programme.title: Friends S7 19
programme.desc: Monica's gorgeous cousin (DENISE RICHARDS) unwittingly wreaks havoc on Chandler and Ross. Rachel and Phoebe hastily plan a surprise bridal party for Monica.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 12
programme.desc: When the guys finally agree to do something the girls like, it leads to a confrontation between Leonard and Sheldon.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 13
programme.desc: Sheldon worries his comfortable lifestyle is preventing him from achieving scientific progress so he asks his friends to make him miserable.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 14
programme.desc: When an online bully destroys Leonard and Sheldon's physics paper, the guys band together to take him down.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 15
programme.desc: Howard gets unsettling news amidst the excitement of the comic-book store reopening, and Penny doesn't practice what she preaches.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 16
programme.desc: An experiment designed to make people fall in love piques Penny and Leonard's interest. Meanwhile, Leonard, Amy, Raj and Emily encounter a "zombie."

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 11
programme.desc: The FBI is tasked with finding the killer of several DEA agents, and Jane goes on a date with a beautiful woman associated with the case.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 12
programme.desc: Jane & the FBI investigate the death of a high-tech cartographer, who may have unearthed a spy ring before he died. Meanwhile, Rigsby & Van Pelt discover an alarming conspiracy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 3
programme.desc: Posing as a thrift store employee, Michael makes shoppers believe that a real waddling duck is just a lifelike decoy, and confuses clerks with a never-ending chain of hangers. Then, he convinces liquor store customers that some corks are made of cheese and a wine can freeze on command. Plus, in a museum he shocks a gullible new employee by destroying a priceless piece then impossibly reconstructing it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 4
programme.desc: Michael convinces car wash patrons that he broke their window, only to miraculously fix it with the push of a button. Then, dry cleaning customers are confused when Michael is suddenly wearing their clothes in the blink of an eye. Plus, he has pet store shoppers convinced that they're seeing multiple fish in an empty water bowl.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 9
programme.desc: Let freedom ring, as World's Dumbest presents "Only in America." Featuring 20 of the most patriotic patriots in the land - from a cop's strange take on the national anthem, to a dangerous mishap with a bald eagle, and the most insane thank you to thetroops ever put on film. Plus awesome commentary from our cast of America's best comics, including Brendon Walsh, Kevin McCaffrey and Jaime Andrews.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 13
programme.desc: Jane joins a separatist commune to find out how a U.S. attorney was found dead in Mexico, despite no record of her crossing the border. Rigsby & Van Pelt go to LaRoche for help.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 2
programme.desc: The competition heats up as Brandon and Lori find themselves in an all out bidding war with the tough-talking Taylor brothers. Amidst the chaos, Jesse goes all-in for a locker that could be hiding an expert marksman's rare weapons. And later, Sean unveils a bin whose stench is so rancid it sends the buyers running. But when one of our competitors takes a gamble, the entire group is blown away by the score.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 3
programme.desc: Our buyers go to war to win a locker packed with valuable vintage surf gear. Then, Brandon and Lori get stuck with a busted bin, but when they find a glass case filled with an unidentifiable goo, they're left wondering if this unit smells like moneyor just plain stinks. And later, the day's final auction unleashes a bidding war so medieval, someone will have to be carted away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 3
programme.desc: Posing as a thrift store employee, Michael makes shoppers believe that a real waddling duck is just a lifelike decoy, and confuses clerks with a never-ending chain of hangers. Then, he convinces liquor store customers that some corks are made of cheese and a wine can freeze on command. Plus, in a museum he shocks a gullible new employee by destroying a priceless piece then impossibly reconstructing it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 4
programme.desc: Michael convinces car wash patrons that he broke their window, only to miraculously fix it with the push of a button. Then, dry cleaning customers are confused when Michael is suddenly wearing their clothes in the blink of an eye. Plus, he has pet store shoppers convinced that they're seeing multiple fish in an empty water bowl.

programme.title: ER S1 11
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve, and Cvetic is still missing. Benton announces the availability of a dying man's organs before he has permission. Ross shows up at Hathaway's engagement party.

programme.title: The Rookie: Feds (Season 1)

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)

Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: CIA (Season 1)
programme.desc: When a known smuggler is flagged at the New York border with unidentified cargo, Colin and Bill head upstate to track. To find this smuggler, they must enlist the help of a foreign intelligence officer looking to defect.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney (Season 3)

programme.title: FBI (Season 8)
programme.desc: When paintings from a high-profile international cultural exchange are stolen – leaving a security guard dead – the team races to recover the priceless artworks. Meanwhile, Maggie turns to a friend for help profiling suspects.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: It's a day of food, play & learning! The kids have a teddy bear picnic & learn to say hello with a wave!

programme.title: Learning How to Be a Good Friend!
programme.desc: Buster learns to be a good friend! He welcomes a new, shy student & learns it's not okay to cheat in a game!

programme.title: When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Buster is a hero for his friends! He saves Scout from a scary storm & gets pulled out of the mud by a tractor!

programme.title: How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: How does JJ like to play? He pretends to be a doctor, plays "Simon Says" & camps with his siblings!

programme.title: Cody Is a Good Brother & a Good Friend
programme.desc: Cody is a good brother & friend! He learns he's a big brother & welcomes his new sister Kendi home!

programme.title: Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: Let's get curious & creative! The mysterious Curiosity Crew appears & Blippi learns to mix colors with them!

programme.title: Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Blippi makes fun nature discoveries! He learns why islands don't float & how ants walk in a straight line!

programme.title: How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi wonders how things work! He learns how honey is made, how cranes build & what first cars were like!

programme.title: Baby John's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Baby John's on a big animal adventure! He takes a tour of a farm, finds a lost lamb & visits the zoo!

programme.title: What Makes Our Family So Special!
programme.desc: What makes our family so special? Baby John plays with grandpa & learns why his big sister Jill is great!

programme.title: Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: It's a creative farm adventure! Ella brings school to the barn, makes delicious jam & does some stargazing!

programme.title: Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: There are big surprises on the farm! Ella & Bee find a mysterious tortoise egg & meet new tiger twin friends!

programme.title: JJ's Fun Learning Fundamentals!
programme.desc: JJ learns the fundamentals! He counts baby chicks with Grandpa, learns shapes & mixes colors with jello!

programme.title: JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ learns to be kind! He uses the magic words, learns to share his toys & helps his family around the house!

programme.title: Orphle's Big Day of Trouble!
programme.desc: It's Orphle's big day of trouble! He makes colorful clones of himself & attacks his friends' cardboard castle!

programme.title: When Magical Pet Powers Run Wild!
programme.desc: Magical Pet powers run wild! A Bubble Monster traps everyone & a sick Shrubcub makes vines grow!

programme.title: Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's inventions are going haywire! The smart house has a tantrum & a time machine creates a pterodactyl!

programme.title: Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: It's sci-fi mayhem! Arpo gets stuck in zero gravity mode & accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray!

programme.title: When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Buster's dreams come to life! He dreams he's a fish in the sea & blasts off to space as a rocket!

programme.title: Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning & growing! He overcomes his fear of the carwash & learns the importance of dental health!

programme.title: Funny Feelings & Creative Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko has creative fixes for funny feelings! He cheers up a sad Fiona & paints a bus to help an anxious Mech!

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 11 - GWS Giants v Brisbane Lions
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue - Episode 1
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: I was actually there - Nicky Winmar's Stand Against Racism
programme.desc: It's a day etched into Australian sporting folklore for all the wrong reasons. A moment on a footy field where Nicky Winmar, a proud Noongar man, called out racism.

programme.title: The Australian Dream
programme.desc: Walkley award-winning writer Stan Grant tells the remarkable story of indigenous AFL legend Adam Goodes. Through the backdrop of Goodes' journey, the film explores race, identity and belonging in Australia today.

programme.title: Island Echoes with Nornie Bero - Episode 8
programme.desc: Join acclaimed Torres Strait Islander chef and cultural ambassador Nornie Bero in Island Echoes, a vibrant journey through the breathtaking landscapes and rich traditions of her homeland.

programme.title: Field to Feast - Episode 4
programme.desc: Thanh "The Fruit Nerd" Truong takes a deep dive into Australian tomatoes, more specifically Roma tomatoes and enjoys a traditional Italian feast, whilst making home-made passata and gnocchi.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 144
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you today's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: Compass - From Ukraine with Love
programme.desc: Ukrainian vet, Maria Mykytiuk, lived an idyllic life until Russia invaded her home of Bucha in 2022. She survived violence and the death of her best friend. Now Maria is safe in Australia, and using her voice to help Ukraine.

programme.title: Off Country - Episode 4
programme.desc: Follow the lives of seven Indigenous students who spend a year boarding at one of the oldest and most elite boarding schools in the country, Geelong Grammar.

programme.title: Stuff the British Stole - Girl And Her Doll
programme.desc: In 2022, a tattered black doll was sent from Britain to the First Nations people of lutruwita/Tasmania, carrying with it a devastating story of a stolen child. Marc Fennell unravels a story of heartbreak and injustice.

programme.title: Dr Ann's Secret Lives - Orangutans
programme.desc: Dr Ann Jones ventures into the heart of Borneo's jungle to look for wild orangutan, following a team of dedicated scientists whose work is leading to new insights into one of the world's most intelligent & elusive great apes.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue - Episode 1
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: ABC Late News Weekend - Episode 42
programme.desc: When you need to know what's happening turn to ABC News for coverage you can trust. Meredith Sheehan brings you the day's news by reporters in more locations across Australia, connecting communities and telling your stories.

programme.title: Offsiders - Episode 16
programme.desc: Abbey Gelmi and the panel cover the leadup to Rugby League's State of Origin Game 1, plus the countdown to the FIFA World Cup and the latest from the NRL, Super Rugby, Super Netball and more.

programme.desc: Thanh "The Fruit Nerd" Truong takes a deep dive into Australian tomatoes, more specifically Roma tomatoes and enjoys a traditional Italian feast, whilst making home-made passata and gnocchi.

programme.title: Common Cause - Island of Wisdom - Solomon Islands
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by outside forces, the Solomon Island Rangers Association visits the Torres Strait in Australia to learn how traditional knowledge and western science are being harnessed to protect culture and the environment.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue - Episode 1

programme.title: A Brief History of Cricket Down Under: The 80s - Leadership Factor
programme.desc: With a combination of vision and confidence, some extraordinary and brave '80s captains set lofty standards for their team to follow. This episode presents a critique of those who led their countries on Australian soil.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 15

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Set in the early years of the Republic of China, the wealthy Kang family is brutally murdered, and their young daughter —the sole witness— mysteriously disappears. For decades, the haunting of the Kang house on Green Wood Lane lingers. As the truth behind the tragedy unfolds, motives of revenge and death intertwine in this chilling mystery.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Detrimental

As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jing Wen, a struggling drama student, takes on a modelling job to help cover her tuition costs. As she becomes a model for an enigmatic artist specializing in expressive human body sketches, Jing Wen accidentally uncovers a shocking truth, plunging her into a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: The Ones You Didn't Burn
programme.desc: After their father's death, Nathan and his sister return to their family home to prepare it for sale. While there, Nathan discovers that the land was stolen from the ancestors of two women accused of witchcraft. As he delves deeper, he uncovers an occult conspiracy linked to their father's death which now threatens them both.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Those closest to Madison Nygard share the agonising details around the beautiful 16-year-old's terrifying abduction as she walked home from a party.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: When beautiful Jalajhia Finklea vanished the day before her 18th birthday, her Wampanoag Tribe members immediately took action.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: When two beloved brothers are gunned down in their home, their devastated mother leads Gwinnett detectives to a suspect close to home.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S5)
programme.desc: A painful breakup ends in tragedy when a correctional officer fatally wounds his ex-girlfriend. The prosecution say he's a killer, but the defence argues he was under attack and shot in self-defence.

programme.title: The First 48 (S25)
programme.desc: When a man is shot on the side of the road, clues lead Detective Jason White to an ongoing crime spree in his 100th case for Tulsa Homicide.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A man attempts a daring escape from court; a judge has to deal with a defendant's outburst; an inmate tries to have his attorney removed from his case.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A man attacks a defendant who's charged with the murder of his twin brother; a judge plays an ill-advised prank on an attorney; and more.

programme.title: The Braemar Hill Murders
programme.desc: In April 1985, two western teenagers studying in Hong Kong were set upon by a gang of Chinese youths, who proceeded to torture and stab them to death.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: Nick Davis investigates a local artist found murdered in his home. With very little evidence, Detective Davis methodically pursues every lead until a lucky break points him toward a surprise suspect.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: In 2019, Delinord Dumercy takes the stand for the second time, claiming that his decision to shoot and ultimately kill James Peoples was in self-defence and not murder.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A sudden illness takes hold of a beloved doctor, leaving her family helpless as the illness takes a fatal turn. The investigation into her death takes her family on a harrowing journey.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape
programme.desc: Scott Perala takes down a career criminal, while FBI Agent, Robert Wittman, investigates a man pretending to be a sheikh selling fake artwork.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8)
programme.desc: Historical Bucks County, is alarmed when several young men vanish one after the other within a week. Detectives unearth a ruthless murder spree in this seemingly picture-perfect farming community.

programme.title: Murder at the Motel
programme.desc: On July 9th, 2018, officers from the Beckley Police Department received a distressing call from a woman claiming that she and her friends had been kidnapped and terrorised at the Travelodge on Harper Road.

programme.title: Sleeping with a Killer (S2)
programme.desc: When a young woman finally breaks free from a possessive boyfriend, his inability to let go reveals how deadly jealousy can become.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Aileen Wuornos is a woman fleeing a troubled past and yearning for a connection. Instead of finding love, she develops a simmering rage in her heart that finally explodes.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a woman, who was allegedly gunned down by her neighbour after an argument over cats and dogs.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.
